name: Card Stack
summary: A testimonial and content showcase component featuring cards that transition in a stacked arrangement, creating an engaging carousel-like experience for displaying reviews, features, or user stories.
detailedDescription: The Card Stack component presents content in an elegant stacked arrangement where cards transition smoothly from one to the next, creating a compact yet engaging display format. Particularly effective for testimonials, this component shows multiple pieces of content in a limited space while maintaining visual interest through smooth transitions. The stack effect creates depth perception with cards appearing layered behind one another, and transitions can include sliding, fading, or rotating animations that feel natural and polished. Navigation controls allow users to manually advance through cards, or automatic cycling can be enabled for passive viewing. Each card maintains consistent styling while supporting varied content including quotes, author information, photos, ratings, and call-to-action buttons. The component is optimized for performance with smooth GPU-accelerated transitions. Perfect for testimonial sections, case study showcases, feature highlights, or any context where presenting multiple similar content items in sequence enhances the narrative without requiring excessive vertical space.
purpose: Display multiple testimonials or content pieces in compact, space-efficient format
Create engaging sequential presentations through smooth card transitions
Showcase customer reviews, case studies, or feature highlights effectively
Provide both manual navigation and automatic cycling options for flexibility
Maintain visual interest through stacked depth and polished animations
behavior: Arranges cards in stacked formation with visible depth layering
Transitions between cards with smooth sliding, fading, or rotating animations
Supports manual navigation through arrow buttons or pagination dots
Optionally cycles through cards automatically at configurable intervals
Maintains consistent card styling across all stack items
Uses GPU-accelerated animations for smooth 60fps transitions
Adapts stack height and card sizing responsively
visualCharacteristics: Stacked card arrangement creating depth through layering
Smooth, polished transitions between content items
Compact vertical footprint maximizing content density
Configurable from subtle to dynamic animation styles
Clean, readable layouts emphasizing content clarity
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
